title: Visualizing ReLU Network Decision Boundaries
description: A deep dive into the geometry of ReLU neural networks: why activation patterns tile the input space into convex polytopes, how the dual graph captures network structure, and how to build an interactive browser-based visualizer using D3.js. Companion to the Neural Network Elements project and PMLR 2025 paper.

title: An Introduction to Tropical Geometry
description: Tropical geometry replaces ordinary arithmetic with the (min, +) semiring, turning algebraic varieties into piecewise-linear objects that are amenable to combinatorial analysis. This tutorial builds the theory from scratch — tropical polynomials, Newton polytopes, and the connection to Porteous' formula — with interactive visualizations powered by PyScript.

title: Topological Data Analysis for Financial Time Series
description: Persistent homology extracts robust topological features from noisy, high-dimensional data that classical statistics misses. This tutorial applies TDA to financial time series — computing Vietoris-Rips persistence diagrams on sliding windows of equity returns, and using the resulting features for regime detection and risk modeling. All examples are self-contained Python notebooks.
